examples: Pea pods burst open when overripe.
The fruiterer picked over a stock of plums and removed the overripe ones.
Do not mix yohimbine with foods containing tyramine, like cheese, wine, and overripe fruit.
Except except, somebody must like them, because more of these overripe fatties appear on restaurant lists every month.
With the whole array done in what look like overripe Techicolor hues, the stage looked variously gaudy and flat.
